project_type: React 18.3 SPA with Three.js 3D head visualization, DMS telemetry dashboard
test_framework: Vitest with @testing-library/react, jsdom environment, setup in src/tests/setup.ts
build_command: npx tsc --noEmit (type checking only - npm registry blocked so no npm install possible)
verification_instructions: Run npx tsc --noEmit to verify no TypeScript errors. Cannot run npm install due to INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network.
setup_instructions: npm install && npm run dev (port 3000). Cannot install in current sandbox due to network restrictions.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode - npm registry is blocked. Cannot run npm install, npm run dev, or npm test. Must rely on TypeScript AST/type-checking for validation. node_modules may already be present from prior work.
contribution_requirements: Work on feature/live-dms-telemetry-receiver branch. Do not modify UI layout. Keep existing dummy telemetry working. Push to feature branch only.
key_patterns: TelemetryProvider interface pattern in src/services/telemetry.ts. Factory function createTelemetryProvider(). Hook useTelemetry() with RAF-based updates and connection polling. Dashboard expects DMSTelemetry type. RightHeadPanel expects headPose.yaw/pitch/roll, gaze.x/y/onRoad, confidence.eyesVisible/faceDetected. DummyTelemetryProvider uses 6-state machine (normal/getting_drowsy/drowsy/recovering/phone_check/distracted) with lerp transitions at 10Hz.
directory_structure: src/types/ (type definitions), src/services/ (telemetry providers/factory), src/hooks/ (React hooks), src/components/ (UI components), src/components/cockpit/ (cockpit layout panels), src/utils/ (utility functions), src/components/__tests__/ and src/services/__tests__/ (tests)
